game_info.title: Spire Climber
game_info.concept:
We fused card games and roguelikes together to make the best single player deckbuilder we could. Craft a unique deck, encounter bizarre creatures, discover relics of immense power, and Slay the Spire!

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/slay-the-spire/id1491530147

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

We fused card games and roguelikes together to make the best single player deckbuilder we could. Craft a unique deck, encounter bizarre creatures, discover relics of immense power, and Slay the Spire!

Features:

- Dynamic Deck Building: Choose your cards wisely! Discover hundreds of cards to add to your deck with each attempt at climbing the Spire. Select cards that work together to efficiently dispatch foes and reach the top
- An Ever-changing Spire: Whenever you embark on a journey up the Spire, the layout differs each time. Choose a risky or safe path, face different enemies, choose different cards, discover different relics, and even fight different bosses!
- Powerful Relics to Discover: Powerful items known as relics can be found throughout the Spire. The effects of these relics can greatly enhance your deck through powerful interactions. But beware, obtaining a relic may cost you more than just gold…
game_info.description:
Welcome to Spire Climber, a tactical deck-building roguelike adventure.
You must ascend the dangerous Spire, battling bizarre geometric creatures and collecting powerful artifacts.
Start with a basic deck of cards and draft new ones after every victory to create powerful synergies.
Manage your Energy to play Attack and Skill cards, block incoming damage, and defeat the Boss at the summit.
Death is permanent, but each climb offers new strategies to master.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate map paths, select cards in hand, choose rewards
Space / Enter: Confirm selection, Play selected card, Enter rooms
Z: End Turn (during combat)
Shift: View Deck / Discard Pile (hold)
ESC: Pause Game
R: Restart Game (only on Game Over screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Basic functionality test: Start game, enter first room, and attempt to play a card.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Press ENTER to start. Navigate the map to the first node. In combat, select the first available card and play it. End turn if no energy.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Game transitions from START to MAP to BATTLE. Player energy decreases when cards are played. Turn ends correctly.

TEST_2.test_description: Survival strategy test: Prioritize blocking when threatened to survive longer.
TEST_2.strategy_description: In combat, check enemy intent. If enemy is attacking, prioritize playing 'Defend' cards. Otherwise, play attacks. Rest at campfires.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Player survives multiple turns and potentially wins the first combat encounter by effectively mitigating damage.
